title: Operate tractors
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate tractors demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare tractor for operation

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Source and interpret machinery operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions for tractor operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret machinery operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions for tractor operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret machinery operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions for tractor operation.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment and safety equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment and safety equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment and safety equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Select and attach equipment as directed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and attach equipment as directed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and attach equipment as directed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Conduct tractor routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tractor routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tractor routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare tractor for operation

elements.title: Operate tractor

pcs.text: Carry out pre-start and start up procedures required for tractor operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-start and start up procedures required for tractor operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-start and start up procedures required for tractor operation.

pcs.text: Drive and operate tractor in a smooth and controlled manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Drive and operate tractor in a smooth and controlled manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Drive and operate tractor in a smooth and controlled manner.

pcs.text: Apply workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures associated with tractor operation and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures associated with tractor operation and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace environmental and biosecurity procedures associated with tractor operation and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment.

pcs.text: Complete work according to agreed plan as directed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete work according to agreed plan as directed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete work according to agreed plan as directed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Report abnormal monitoring system indicators and alarms to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report abnormal monitoring system indicators and alarms to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report abnormal monitoring system indicators and alarms to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate tractor

elements.title: Complete tractor operation

pcs.text: Park tractor and conduct shut down procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Park tractor and conduct shut down procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Park tractor and conduct shut down procedures.

pcs.text: Perform routine operational servicing according to the operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform routine operational servicing according to the operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine operational servicing according to the operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor.

pcs.text: Clean, decontaminate, secure and store tractor and attached equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, decontaminate, secure and store tractor and attached equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, decontaminate, secure and store tractor and attached equipment.

pcs.text: Remove and store keys in the required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and store keys in the required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store keys in the required location.

pcs.text: Maintain tractor and equipment use records in required format
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain tractor and equipment use records in required format?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain tractor and equipment use records in required format.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete tractor operation

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
